title: Add PolyDreamer to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [PolyDreamer](https://polydreamer.amitinfotech.net/) to image
- Generate images and videos from text prompts using Polinations AI with PolyDreamer. Connect your own API key or use the free tier.

Fixes #9978

gist.headline: Welcome, PolyDreamer!
gist.blurb: A new app has sprouted in the greenhouse. PolyDreamer lets you generate images and videos from text prompts, hooking right into the hive's API.
gist.summary: Added PolyDreamer, a community-built interface for generating images and videos from text prompts, to the apps showcase and greenhouse.
gist.impact: Users can now discover PolyDreamer in the community directory to create AI media using either their own API key or the free tier.
gist.visual_concept: The app is called 'PolyDreamer' and focuses on generating images and videos. A 'dreaming' motif fits perfectly. Polly the bee wearing a tiny nightcap, watching a retro monitor that is generating a beautiful, glowing dreamscape.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny nightcap, looking at a retro CRT monitor that displays a glowing, magical dreamscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny nightcap, looking at a retro CRT monitor that displays a glowing, magical dreamscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
